LAW AND MOTION 302, PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION, DEFENDANT GLORIA FORTIER'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE CURTIS KARNOW.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hrg On Claim Of Exemption; Notice
Off Calendar Jul-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gloria Fortier, Tel. 415.408.8880, defendant/claimant appearing on her own behalf;
No other appearance.

The matter was discussed. The court vacated its tentative ruling. Defendant Gloria Fortier's Claim Of Exemption is taken under submission. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR # 7489

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.
Appearances:
Gloria Fortier (646.5203) judgment debtor appearing in propria persona. No other appearances.
Ms. Fortier presented the court with evidence of medical expenses, child support and other financial assistance as requested in the tentative ruling. The court granted the judgment debtor's exemption. Funds that were garnished are ordered to be released to debtor. Order signed. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
